description: An in-game fighting game key visual / combat screenshot in the style of Street Fighter 6 or Tekken 8 intro art. Two anime-style male warriors square off in the center of a dramatic nighttime Chinese temple courtyard — a shirtless straw-hat pirate with a warm orange-red fire aura on the left, and a spiky-haired martial artist in an orange gi charging a massive crackling blue lightning energy sphere on the right. Ships with a complete fighting-game HUD (dual health bars, round timer, P1/P2 portrait panels with named fighters and emblems, per-side combo counters and max gauges). Warm-orange vs cool-blue split color grading matches the rival-fighter convention of the genre. Tuned for gpt-image-2 at 16:9.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 街头霸王 6 或铁拳 8 风格的格斗游戏视觉截图。两名动漫风格的男性战士在夜晚的中国寺庙庭院中对决，配有完整的格斗游戏 HUD（双血条、回合计时器、P1/P2 角色面板、连击计数器和能量槽）。为 gpt-image-2 优化，16:9 比例。
description_i18n.zh-TW: Street Fighter 6 或 Tekken 8 風格的格鬥遊戲視覺截圖。兩名動漫風格的男性戰士在夜晚的中國寺廟庭院中對決，配有完整的格鬥遊戲 HUD（雙血條、回合計時器、P1/P2 角色面板、連擊計數器和能量槽）。為 gpt-image-2 優化，16:9 比例。
description_i18n.ja: Street Fighter 6 や Tekken 8 スタイルの格闘ゲームビジュアル。夜の中国寺院の中庭で対決する2人のアニメ風男性戦士を描き、完全な格闘ゲーム HUD（デュアル体力ゲージ、ラウンドタイマー、P1/P2 キャラクターパネル、コンボカウンター、ゲージ）を搭載。gpt-image-2 用に最適化、16:9。
description_i18n.ko: Street Fighter 6 또는 Tekken 8 스타일의 격투 게임 비주얼 스크린샷. 밤의 중국 사원 안뜰에서 대결하는 두 애니메이션 스타일 남성 전사를 묘사하며, 완전한 격투 게임 HUD(듀얼 체력바, 라운드 타이머, P1/P2 캐릭터 패널, 콤보 카운터, 게이지)를 포함. gpt-image-2 최적화, 16:9 비율.
description_i18n.de: Kampfspiel-Screenshot im Stil von Street Fighter 6 oder Tekken 8. Zwei Anime-Krieger kämpfen nachts in einem chinesischen Tempelhof, mit vollständigem Kampfspiel-HUD (Lebensbalken, Rundentimer, P1/P2-Charaktertafeln, Combo-Zähler und Energieleisten). Optimiert für gpt-image-2 im 16:9-Format.
description_i18n.fr: Capture d'écran de jeu de combat dans le style de Street Fighter 6 ou Tekken 8. Deux guerriers anime s'affrontent dans une cour de temple chinois la nuit, avec un HUD complet de jeu de combat (barres de vie, minuteur, panneaux P1/P2, compteurs de combo et jauges). Optimisé pour gpt-image-2 en 16:9.
description_i18n.ru: Скриншот файтинга в стиле Street Fighter 6 или Tekken 8. Два воина в стиле аниме сражаются ночью во дворе китайского храма, с полным боевым HUD (полосы здоровья, таймер раунда, панели P1/P2, счётчики комбо и шкалы энергии). Оптимизировано для gpt-image-2 в формате 16:9.
description_i18n.es: Captura de pantalla de juego de lucha al estilo de Street Fighter 6 o Tekken 8. Dos guerreros estilo anime luchan de noche en un patio de templo chino, con HUD completo de juego de lucha (barras de vida, temporizador, paneles P1/P2, contadores de combo y medidores). Optimizado para gpt-image-2 en 16:9.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Captura de tela de jogo de luta no estilo de Street Fighter 6 ou Tekken 8. Dois guerreiros estilo anime lutam à noite no pátio de um templo chinês, com HUD completo de jogo de luta (barras de vida, cronômetro, painéis P1/P2, contadores de combo e medidores). Otimizado para gpt-image-2 em 16:9.
description_i18n.it: Screenshot di picchiaduro in stile Street Fighter 6 o Tekken 8. Due guerrieri in stile anime combattono di notte nel cortile di un tempio cinese, con HUD completo da gioco di combattimento (barre vita, timer round, pannelli P1/P2, contatori combo e misuratori). Ottimizzato per gpt-image-2 in 16:9.
description_i18n.vi: Ảnh chụp màn hình game đối kháng theo phong cách Street Fighter 6 hoặc Tekken 8. Hai chiến binh phong cách anime đối đầu trong sân đền Trung Quốc về đêm, với HUD đầy đủ (thanh máu, bộ đếm thời gian, bảng nhân vật P1/P2, bộ đếm combo và thanh năng lượng). Tối ưu cho gpt-image-2 ở tỷ lệ 16:9.
description_i18n.pl: Zrzut ekranu z gry bijatyki w stylu Street Fighter 6 lub Tekken 8. Dwaj wojownicy w stylu anime walczą w nocy na dziedzińcu chińskiej świątyni, z pełnym HUD gry bijatyki (paski zdrowia, timer rundy, panele P1/P2, liczniki combo i wskaźniki energii). Zoptymalizowane dla gpt-image-2 w formacie 16:9.
description_i18n.id: Screenshot game pertarungan bergaya Street Fighter 6 atau Tekken 8. Dua pejuang bergaya anime bertarung di malam hari di halaman kuil China, dengan HUD lengkap game pertarungan (bar kesehatan, timer ronde, panel karakter P1/P2, penghitung combo, dan pengukur energi). Dioptimalkan untuk gpt-image-2 dalam rasio 16:9.
description_i18n.nl: Vechtgame-screenshot in de stijl van Street Fighter 6 of Tekken 8. Twee anime-krijgers vechten 's nachts op een Chinese tempelplaats, met volledige vechtgame-HUD (levensbalken, rondetimer, P1/P2-karakterpanelen, combotellers en energiemeters). Geoptimaliseerd voor gpt-image-2 in 16:9.
description_i18n.ar: لقطة شاشة للعبة قتال بأسلوب Street Fighter 6 أو Tekken 8. يتقاتل محاربان بأسلوب الأنمي ليلاً في فناء معبد صيني، مع واجهة HUD كاملة للعبة القتال (أشرطة الصحة، مؤقت الجولة، لوحات الشخصيات P1/P2، عدادات الكومبو والطاقة). محسّن لـ gpt-image-2 بنسبة 16:9.
description_i18n.tr: Street Fighter 6 veya Tekken 8 tarzında dövüş oyunu ekran görüntüsü. İki anime tarzı savaşçı gece Çin tapınağı avlusunda dövüşüyor, tam dövüş oyunu HUD'u ile (sağlık çubukları, tur sayacı, P1/P2 karakter panelleri, kombo sayaçları ve enerji göstergeleri). gpt-image-2 için optimize edilmiş, 16:9 oranında.
description_i18n.uk: Скріншот файтингу в стилі Street Fighter 6 або Tekken 8. Двоє воїнів у стилі аніме б'ються вночі на подвір'ї китайського храму, з повним бойовим HUD (шкали здоров'я, таймер раунду, панелі P1/P2, лічильники комбо та шкали енергії). Оптимізовано для gpt-image-2 у форматі 16:9.
description_i18n.en: An in-game fighting game key visual / combat screenshot in the style of Street Fighter 6 or Tekken 8 intro art. Two anime-style male warriors square off in the center of a dramatic nighttime Chinese temple courtyard — a shirtless straw-hat pirate with a warm orange-red fire aura on the left, and a spiky-haired martial artist in an orange gi charging a massive crackling blue lightning energy sphere on the right. Ships with a complete fighting-game HUD (dual health bars, round timer, P1/P2 portrait panels with named fighters and emblems, per-side combo counters and max gauges). Warm-orange vs cool-blue split color grading matches the rival-fighter convention of the genre. Tuned for gpt-image-2 at 16:9.

query.en:
A high-detail anime fighting game screenshot, 16:9 aspect ratio, cinematic key visual in the style of Street Fighter 6 or Tekken 8 intro art. Two anime male warriors in dynamic combat poses facing each other in the center.

# LEFT FIGHTER
{argument name="left_fighter" default="shirtless, wearing a worn straw hat, red battle-scar across left eye, grinning with clenched teeth, shark-tooth necklace, tattered red cape, black pants with a skull-pattern sash, bare feet, right fist raised ready to strike, orange fire particles and water splashing at his feet, warm orange-red energy aura surrounding him"}.

# RIGHT FIGHTER
{argument name="right_fighter" default="spiky jet-black hair, wearing an orange martial-arts gi with a single black kanji character on the left chest, blue waistband sash, black wristbands, both hands in a charging pose with a massive crackling blue lightning energy sphere building between them, intense focused expression, bright blue electric aura"}.

# BACKGROUND
{argument name="background" default="dramatic nighttime Chinese-style temple courtyard, red pagoda architecture, stone-carved dragon columns, dark cloudy sky with blue moonlight, glowing paper lanterns, scattered debris on the ground"}.

# GAME UI OVERLAY
- Top bar: two horizontal health bars (red, mostly full) with two smaller blue meter bars below, a round central timer reading "{argument name="timer" default="45"}" in white, labeled "ROUND {argument name="round_number" default="2"}" below it, left percentage "{argument name="left_hp_percent" default="75%"}", right percentage "{argument name="right_hp_percent" default="80%"}".
- Top-left corner: P1 portrait avatar of the left fighter, character name "{argument name="left_name" default="CAPTAIN RYUUGA"}" in bold, subtitle "{argument name="left_title" default="KING OF THE SEAS"}", {argument name="left_emblem" default="skull-and-crossed-swords emblem"}.
- Top-right corner: P2 portrait avatar of the right fighter, character name "{argument name="right_name" default="KAZE RENSHIN"}" in bold, subtitle "{argument name="right_title" default="DRAGON'S FIST"}", {argument name="right_emblem" default="dragon emblem"}.
- Bottom-left: large orange number "{argument name="left_combo" default="12"}" with "HITS COMBO" text, horizontal orange gauge bar labeled "{argument name="left_gauge_label" default="3 MAX"}".
- Bottom-right: large blue number "{argument name="right_combo" default="15"}" with "HITS COMBO" text, horizontal blue gauge bar labeled "{argument name="right_gauge_label" default="MAX 4"}".

# Overall style
Cinematic, hyperdetailed, vibrant color grading, high contrast between warm orange (left half) and cool blue (right half), official fighting game key art quality, 4K resolution.

# Negative prompt
no watermark, no studio logos, no warped Latin or Japanese characters in UI, no gibberish glyphs, no low-res UI, no duplicated HUD widgets, no extra fingers on either fighter, no misaligned or crooked health bars, no copyrighted character likeness (original anime-styled designs only), no modern firearms, no real-world brands, no cluttered or overlapping UI panels, no signature.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：A high-detail anime fighting game screenshot, 16:9 aspect ratio, cinematic key visual in the style of Street Fighter 6 or Tekken 8 intro art. Two anime male warriors in dynamic combat poses facing each other in the center.

# LEFT FIGHTER
{argument name="left_fighter" default="shirtless, wearing a worn straw hat, red battle-scar across left eye, grinning with clenched teeth, shark-tooth necklace, tattered red cape, black pants with a skull-pattern sash, bare feet, right fist raised ready to strike, orange fire particles and water splashing at his feet, warm orange-red energy aura surrounding him"}.

# RIGHT FIGHTER
{argument name="right_fighter" default="spiky jet-black hair, wearing an orange martial-arts gi with a single black kanji character on the left chest, blue waistband sash, black wristbands, both hands in a charging pose with a massive crackling blue lightning energy sphere building between them, intense focused expression, bright blue electric aura"}.

# BACKGROUND
{argument name="background" default="dramatic nighttime Chinese-style temple courtyard, red pagoda architecture, stone-carved dragon columns, dark cloudy sky with blue moonlight, glowing paper lanterns, scattered debris on the ground"}.

# GAME UI OVERLAY
- Top bar: two horizontal health bars (red, mostly full) with two smaller blue meter bars below, a round central timer reading "{argument name="timer" default="45"}" in white, labeled "ROUND {argument name="round_number" default="2"}" below it, left percentage "{argument name="left_hp_percent" default="75%"}", right percentage "{argument name="right_hp_percent" default="80%"}".
- Top-left corner: P1 portrait avatar of the left fighter, character name "{argument name="left_name" default="CAPTAIN RYUUGA"}" in bold, subtitle "{argument name="left_title" default="KING OF THE SEAS"}", {argument name="left_emblem" default="skull-and-crossed-swords emblem"}.
- Top-right corner: P2 portrait avatar of the right fighter, character name "{argument name="right_name" default="KAZE RENSHIN"}" in bold, subtitle "{argument name="right_title" default="DRAGON'S FIST"}", {argument name="right_emblem" default="dragon emblem"}.
- Bottom-left: large orange number "{argument name="left_combo" default="12"}" with "HITS COMBO" text, horizontal orange gauge bar labeled "{argument name="left_gauge_label" default="3 MAX"}".
- Bottom-right: large blue number "{argument name="right_combo" default="15"}" with "HITS COMBO" text, horizontal blue gauge bar labeled "{argument name="right_gauge_label" default="MAX 4"}".

# Overall style
Cinematic, hyperdetailed, vibrant color grading, high contrast between warm orange (left half) and cool blue (right half), official fighting game key art quality, 4K resolution.

# Negative prompt
no watermark, no studio logos, no warped Latin or Japanese characters in UI, no gibberish glyphs, no low-res UI, no duplicated HUD widgets, no extra fingers on either fighter, no misaligned or crooked health bars, no copyrighted character likeness (original anime-styled designs only), no modern firearms, no real-world brands, no cluttered or overlapping UI panels, no signature.
